understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` on each level without landing on spikes.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is horizontal only (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT). After each move the player falls automatically in the current gravity direction until landing on a solid tile. CLICK removes breakable `x` blocks. Spikes (`u`/`v`) instantly end the attempt. Each level has a 50-turn limit per attempt and 2 attempts total. UNDO reverts prior actions. Gravity can point up or down, and landing positions (left_landing/right_landing) indicate where the fall will stop.
